allow: PowerShell($b = Get-Command bun -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($b\) { $b.Source; bun --version } else { "bun not found on PATH" })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run','dev','--workspace','@ape/api' -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\ape-api.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\ape-api.err"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3001/ ; "RESPONSE: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { "REQUEST FAILED: $_" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
